jobs.title: Freight Operations Specialist 1
jobs.description: At Torc, we have always believed that autonomous vehicle technology will transform how we travel, move freight, and do business. A leader in autonomous driving since 2007, Torc has spent over a decade commercializing our solutions with experienced partners. Now a part of the Daimler family , we are focused solely on developing software for automated trucks to transform how the world moves freight. Join us and catapult your career with the company that helped pioneer autonomous technology, and the first AV software company with the vision to partner directly with a truck manufacturer. Meet the Team: As a Freight…

jobs.title: Director, OEM & Strategic Partnerships
jobs.description:
The US yearly salary range for this role is: $250,000 - $300,000 USD in addition to competitive perks & benefits. Waabi US Inc.’s yearly salary ranges are determined based on several factors in accordance with the Company’s compensation practices. Note: The Company provides additional compensation for employees in this role, including equity incentive awards and an annual performance bonus.

Perks/Benefits:
- Competitive compensation and equity awards.
- Health and Wellness benefits encompassing Medical, Dental and Vision coverage (for full-time employees only).
- Unlimited Vacation.
- Flexible hours and Work from Home support.
- Daily drinks, snacks and catered meals (when in office).
- Regularly scheduled team building activities and social events both on-site, off-site & virtually.
- As we grow, this list continues to evolve! 

Waabi is a technology start-up building technologies to transform the way the world moves. Join our talented team to be a part of the future and to make an impact!

Waabi is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating a supportive, inclusive, and accessible workplace for all our employees. We seek applicants of all backgrounds and identities, across race, color, ethnicity, national origin or ancestry, age, citizenship, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, military or veteran status, marital status, pregnancy or parental status, caregiver status, disability, or any other characteristic protected by law. We make workplace accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities as required by applicable law. If reasonable accommodation is needed to participate in the job application or interview process please let our recruiting team know.

jobs.title: Senior IT Operations Specialist
jobs.description:
The Canada salary range for this role is: $100,000 - $150,000 CAD in addition to competitive perks & benefits. Waabi Canada Inc.'s yearly salary ranges are determined based on several factors in accordance with the Company’s compensation practices. The salary base range is reflective of the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position across all Canada locations. Note: The Company may provide additional compensation for employees in this role, including discretionary equity incentive awards and discretionary annual performance bonus.

Perks/Benefits:
- Competitive compensation and equity awards.
- Health and Wellness benefits encompassing Medical, Dental and Vision coverage (for full-time employees only).
- Unlimited Vacation.
- Flexible hours and Work from Home support.
- Daily drinks, snacks and catered meals (when in office).
- Regularly scheduled team building activities and social events both on-site, off-site & virtually.
- As we grow, this list continues to evolve! 

Waabi is a technology start-up building technologies to transform the way the world moves. Join our talented team to be a part of the future and to make an impact!

Waabi is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating a supportive, inclusive, and accessible workplace for all our employees. We seek applicants of all backgrounds and identities, across race, color, ethnicity, national origin or ancestry, age, citizenship, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, military or veteran status, marital status, pregnancy or parental status, caregiver status, disability, or any other characteristic protected by law. We make workplace accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities as required by applicable law. If reasonable accommodation is needed to participate in the job application or interview process please let our recruiting team know.

jobs.title: Senior Commercial Project Manager
jobs.description: Motional’s Las Vegas office is located less than 10 miles from the Las Vegas strip at 730 E Pilot Road and is home to one of the largest fleets of self-driving vehicles. The city’s grid system of roads and being one of America’s “smart cities” allows for extensive research and development testing. Mission Summary: The Commercial Operations Project Manager is pivotal in driving the business forward by strategizing and executing plans to achieve project objectives efficiently. Reporting to the Senior Director of Operations, this role orchestrates seamless communication with stakeholders across the spectrum to ensure alignment toward the overarching goals…

jobs.title: Supervisor, AV Test Operations
jobs.description: Mission Summary: AV Testing Operations Supervisor partners with Operations leadership to develop and implement best practices and protocols for Testing Operators. They serve as the primary point of contact for Testing Operators when issues arise, providing strategic and efficient resolution. Through coordination with Engineering, L&D, Safety, and Operations departments, Supervisors identify and secure the resources necessary for effective daily operations. AV Testing Operations Supervisor manages team member time-off requests while minimizing impact on testing operations, ensures adherence to test scheduling protocols, and oversees daily performance of Testing Operators. They address performance deficiencies through targeted coaching, attendance management, and constructive feedback…

jobs.title: Autonomous Vehicle Operations Specialist II
jobs.description: Our vehicles do more than just drive themselves - they provide value to communities, bridge public transit gaps and move people where they need to go safely, easily and with a lot more fun. We’re building the world’s best autonomy system to reimagine transit by minimizing congestion, expanding access and encouraging better land use in order to foster more green, vibrant and livable spaces. Since our founding in 2017, we’ve given more than 500,000 autonomous rides to real people around the globe. And we’re just getting started. We’re hiring people who share our passion for building the future, today, solving…

About Zoox
Zoox is developing the first ground-up, fully autonomous vehicle fleet and the supporting ecosystem required to bring this technology to market. Sitting at the intersection of robotics, machine learning, and design, Zoox aims to provide the next generation of mobility-as-a-service in urban environments. We’re looking for top talent that shares our passion and wants to be part of a fast-moving and highly execution-oriented team.

Follow us on LinkedIn

Accommodations
If you need an accommodation to participate in the application or interview process please reach out to accommodations@zoox.com or your assigned recruiter.

A Final Note:
You do not need to match every listed expectation to apply for this position. Here at Zoox, we know that diverse perspectives foster the innovation we need to be successful, and we are committed to building a team that encompasses a variety of backgrounds, experiences, and skills.

About Zoox
Zoox is developing the first ground-up, fully autonomous vehicle fleet and the supporting ecosystem required to bring this technology to market. Sitting at the intersection of robotics, machine learning, and design, Zoox aims to provide the next generation of mobility-as-a-service in urban environments. We’re looking for top talent that shares our passion and wants to be part of a fast-moving and highly execution-oriented team.

Follow us on LinkedIn

Accommodations
If you need an accommodation to participate in the application or interview process please reach out to accommodations@zoox.com or your assigned recruiter.

A Final Note:
You do not need to match every listed expectation to apply for this position. Here at Zoox, we know that diverse perspectives foster the innovation we need to be successful, and we are committed to building a team that encompasses a variety of backgrounds, experiences, and skills.

About Zoox
Zoox is developing the first ground-up, fully autonomous vehicle fleet and the supporting ecosystem required to bring this technology to market. Sitting at the intersection of robotics, machine learning, and design, Zoox aims to provide the next generation of mobility-as-a-service in urban environments. We’re looking for top talent that shares our passion and wants to be part of a fast-moving and highly execution-oriented team.

Follow us on LinkedIn

Accommodations
If you need an accommodation to participate in the application or interview process please reach out to accommodations@zoox.com or your assigned recruiter.

A Final Note:
You do not need to match every listed expectation to apply for this position. Here at Zoox, we know that diverse perspectives foster the innovation we need to be successful, and we are committed to building a team that encompasses a variety of backgrounds, experiences, and skills.

About Zoox
Zoox is developing the first ground-up, fully autonomous vehicle fleet and the supporting ecosystem required to bring this technology to market. Sitting at the intersection of robotics, machine learning, and design, Zoox aims to provide the next generation of mobility-as-a-service in urban environments. We’re looking for top talent that shares our passion and wants to be part of a fast-moving and highly execution-oriented team.

Follow us on LinkedIn

Accommodations
If you need an accommodation to participate in the application or interview process please reach out to accommodations@zoox.com or your assigned recruiter.

A Final Note:
You do not need to match every listed expectation to apply for this position. Here at Zoox, we know that diverse perspectives foster the innovation we need to be successful, and we are committed to building a team that encompasses a variety of backgrounds, experiences, and skills.

C o l l a b o r a t i o n : S e r v e a s f u n c t i o n a l l e a d f o r v e n d o r i m p l e m e n t a t i o n s , p a r t n e r i n g w i t h i n t e r n a l t e a m s t o d e l i v e r c u s t o m i n t e g r a t i o n s b e t w e e n F l e e t O r c h e s t r a t i o n p l a t f o r m s a n d S A P . < / l i > < l i > C o m m u n i c a t i o n & a m p ; E n a b l e m e n t : C o m m u n i c a t e c l e a r l y a c r o s s s t a k e h o l d e r s , f a c i l i t a t e u s e r t r a i n i n g , a n d d e m o n s t r a t e s t r o n g w r i t t e n a n d v e r b a l o w n e r s h i p o f d e l i v e r a b l e s . < / l i > Qualifications < l i > B a c k g r o u n d : B S / M S i n E n g i n e e r i n g o r e q u i v a l e n t p r a c t i c a l e x p e r i e n c e , w i t h 8 + y e a r s l e a d i n g S A P E A M i m p l e m e n t a t i o n s f o r c o m p l e x h a r d w a r e - s o f t w a r e p r o d u c t s i n a u t o m o t i v e ( S D V / a u t o n o m o u s ) , a e r o s p a c e , o r r e l a t e d i n d u s t r i e s . < / l i > < l i > T e c h n i c a l D e p t h : D e e p h a n d s - o n e x p e r t i s e i n S A P E A M , i n c l u d i n g E C U - c e n t r i c a s s e t s , c o m p l e x B O M s , p r o d u c t g e n e a l o g y , a n d s e r i a l i z e d / b a t c h - m a n a g e d i n v e n t o r y a n d e q u i p m e n t h i e r a r c h i e s . < / l i > < l i > S y s t e m s & a m p ; E x e c u t i o n : E x p e r i e n c e d r i v i n g e n d - t o - e n d d e l i v e r y — r e q u i r e m e n t s , s o l u t i o n d e s i g n , E A M i n t e g r a t i o n s ( m i d d l e w a r e / c u s t o m A P I s ) , f u n c t i o n a l s p e c i f i c a t i o n s , U A T , a n d p r o d u c t i o n c u t o v e r — u s i n g A g i l e o r W a t e r f a l l m e t h o d o l o g i e s . < / l i > < l i > O w n e r s h i p & a m p ; I n f l u e n c e : P r o v e n a b i l i t y t o p a r t n e r c r o s s - f u n c t i o n a l l y , c o m m u n i c a t e c l e a r l y , d r i v e s c a l a b l e p r o c e s s i m p r o v e m e n t s , a n d o p e r a t e e f f e c t i v e l y i n f a s t - m o v i n g , h i g h - g r o w t h e n v i r o n m e n t s . < / l i > Bonus Qualifications < l i > S A P E x p e r t i s e : C o m b i n e d h a n d s - o n e x p e r i e n c e a c r o s s S A P E A M , F S M , a n d M a s t e r D a t a M a n a g e m e n t , i n c l u d i n g E q u i p m e n t B O M s , M a n u f a c t u r i n g B O M s , a n d T a s k L i s t s . < / l i > < l i > P r o d u c t S t r u c t u r e & a m p ; C o m p l i a n c e : E x p e r i e n c e v a l i d a t i n g a c t u a l v s . a l l o w e d p r o d u c t s t r u c t u r e s ( i P P E / P D N ) , m a n a g i n g p a r t s u p e r s e s s i o n a n d i n t e r c h a n g e a b i l i t y . < / l i > < l i > M a i n t e n a n c e M o d e l i n g : S t r o n g k n o w l e d g e o f h i e r a r c h i c a l t a s k l i s t s s u p p o r t i n g c o m p l e x m a i n t e n a n c e p r o g r a m s . < / l i > < l i > I n t e g r a t i o n : P r o v e n e x p e r i e n c e i n t e g r a t i n g S A P E A M w i t h E W M , P P , a n d Q M . < / l i >
About Zoox
Zoox is developing the first ground-up, fully autonomous vehicle fleet and the supporting ecosystem required to bring this technology to market. Sitting at the intersection of robotics, machine learning, and design, Zoox aims to provide the next generation of mobility-as-a-service in urban environments. We’re looking for top talent that shares our passion and wants to be part of a fast-moving and highly execution-oriented team.

Follow us on LinkedIn

Accommodations
If you need an accommodation to participate in the application or interview process please reach out to accommodations@zoox.com or your assigned recruiter.

A Final Note:
You do not need to match every listed expectation to apply for this position. Here at Zoox, we know that diverse perspectives foster the innovation we need to be successful, and we are committed to building a team that encompasses a variety of backgrounds, experiences, and skills.

M a s t e r D a t a : S t r o n g u n d e r s t a n d i n g o f E W M i n t e g r a t i o n s w i t h P P , Q M , M M / I M , E A M / P M , F S M , M E S , T M , a n d t h i r d - p a r t y w a r e h o u s e s y s t e m s ; s o l i d g r a s p o f m a s t e r d a t a a n d s e r i a l , b a t c h , a n d h a n d l i n g u n i t m a n a g e m e n t . < / l i > < l i > D e l i v e r y & a m p ; C o n f i g u r a t i o n : P r o v e n a b i l i t y t o m a n a g e E W M c o n f i g u r a t i o n , a u t o m a t i c i n b o u n d / o u t b o u n d p r o c e s s i n g ( A S N / E D I ) , W O C R , w a v e s , R F , m o n i t o r i n g , a n d c u s t o m d e v e l o p m e n t s t h r o u g h f u n c t i o n a l s p e c i f i c a t i o n s . < / l i > < l i > E x e c u t i o n & a m p ; Zoox is developing the first ground-up, fully autonomous vehicle fleet and the supporting ecosystem required to bring this technology to market. About Zoox
Zoox is developing the first ground-up, fully autonomous vehicle fleet and the supporting ecosystem required to bring this technology to market. Sitting at the intersection of robotics, machine learning, and design, Zoox aims to provide the next generation of mobility-as-a-service in urban environments. We’re looking for top talent that shares our passion and wants to be part of a fast-moving and highly execution-oriented team.

Follow us on LinkedIn

Accommodations
If you need an accommodation to participate in the application or interview process please reach out to accommodations@zoox.com or your assigned recruiter.

A Final Note:
You do not need to match every listed expectation to apply for this position. Here at Zoox, we know that diverse perspectives foster the innovation we need to be successful, and we are committed to building a team that encompasses a variety of backgrounds, experiences, and skills.

About Zoox
Zoox is developing the first ground-up, fully autonomous vehicle fleet and the supporting ecosystem required to bring this technology to market. Sitting at the intersection of robotics, machine learning, and design, Zoox aims to provide the next generation of mobility-as-a-service in urban environments. We’re looking for top talent that shares our passion and wants to be part of a fast-moving and highly execution-oriented team.

Follow us on LinkedIn

Accommodations
If you need an accommodation to participate in the application or interview process please reach out to accommodations@zoox.com or your assigned recruiter.

A Final Note:
You do not need to match every listed expectation to apply for this position. Here at Zoox, we know that diverse perspectives foster the innovation we need to be successful, and we are committed to building a team that encompasses a variety of backgrounds, experiences, and skills.
